title: loxogramme scolopendrina
intro: Loxogramme scolopendrina, also known as the 'Walking Fern', is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Loxogramme scolopendrina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to harness its medicinal properties.
